heading: Drop Views Example
body:
The following command removes a [view named "listings"](adf-collections-views-create-cmd-egs) on the [airbnb](https://atlas-data-lake.s3.amazonaws.com/json/sample_airbnb/listingsAndReviews.json)
collection in the `sample` database:

```sh
use sample
db.runCommand({ "drop" : "listings" })
```

The previous command returns the following output:

> **Example:** 
>
> ```json
> { "ok" : 1, "ns" : "sample.listings", "nIndexesWas" : 0 }
> ```
